DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT LEGACY PERSONNNEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO AUG-11-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RYAN SHEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DENNIS SIPIN, VP OF OPERATIONS IS PRESENT BY UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. HONORABLE PANG LY ALLOWS THE VENUE CHALLENGE TO BE HEARD BY DEFENDANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE VENUE IS PROPER AND CONTINUES THE MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
